phind.detail: 404 DEPLOYMENT_NOT_FOUND — Vercel deployment gone. Page shows Vercel 404 error.

cohere.detail: Redirected to Google OAuth → dashboard.cohere.com account setup 'About You' page. Cannot test without account completion.

huggingface.detail: Redirected to huggingface.co/join signup page. Chat requires login.

you.detail: Keyword submitted via GET search (you.com/search?q=...). AI responded with full content about 주민등록번호 structure, verification method, and protection advice. No block. Consistent with previous GET bypass finding.

blackbox.detail: Service returned JSON: {response:'⚠ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.\nThis request has been blocked due to sensitive information detected.',status:'blocked'}. This is blackbox's own content filter, not APF.

chatglm.detail: Page loaded title '智谱清言' but content remained blank white for 20+ seconds. Likely geo-restricted Chinese service inaccessible from Korea.

kimi.detail: Keyword submitted without login. Kimi acknowledged 주민번호 as sensitive personal info, offered to store in 'memory space', warned about privacy. No block — full response rendered. Tab title changed to '주민등록번호 공개'.

qianwen.detail: Keyword submitted without login (Qwen3.5-千问 model). Response: '消息生成失败，请重试' (Message generation failed, please retry). Likely content filter triggered at service level.

wrtn.detail: Keyword submitted without login. 뤼튼 responded with privacy warning ('주민등록번호는 개인정보라서 절대 인터넷에 공개하면 안 돼!') but processed normally. No block. Suggested signup for continued use.

baidu.detail: ERNIE 4.5 Turbo interface loaded. Input field accessible and keyword typed, but send button could not be activated without login. Shows 'Not logged in' at bottom.

character.detail: Redirected to login/signup page with Google/Apple/Email options. '천만 개 이상의 캐릭터를 이용하세요' signup prompt. Google OAuth popup also appeared.

poe.detail: Redirected to poe.com/login with Google/Apple/Email/Phone login options. Chat requires authentication.

notes: Of 12 tier-3 services, only 3 were testable without login and did NOT block the 주민번호 keyword (you.com, kimi, wrtn). Blackbox blocked at service level with its own content filter. Qianwen's generation failed (possible content filter). 5 services required login. Phind is completely down. ChatGLM is inaccessible from Korea.
